message:
fix(freeze): fix closure var_ref memory management bugs

- Initialize var_ref header.link to empty list in get_frozen_local_var_ref
  to prevent crash when closure freed before detach
- Add bytecode refcount increment in js_frozen_create_closure,
  js_frozen_create_closure_v2, and js_frozen_define_class to prevent
  double-free when multiple closures share bytecode
